use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF SEASONAL AND PERENNIAL ALLERGIC RHINITIS SYMPTOMS

indications.text:
ZYRTEC-D 12 HOUR Extended Release Tablets should be administered when both the antihistaminic
properties of cetirizine hydrochloride and the nasal decongestant properties of pseudoephedrine
hydrochloride are desired.
